storyInfo: On the variety show, Nyamu says what the audience wants to hear, against her own heart. As Sakiko tries to break onto the set, she is fooled by Morpheus, disguised as a ticket scalper. With Penguin Logistics in hot pursuit, Sakiko steals Nyamu away from the scene.

attributes.content: Ladies and gentlemen, may I now introduce our celebrity guest tonight—Sora!
attributes.name: Host

attributes.content: Hi there on the left! Hi there on the right! And hi there down the middle!
attributes.name: Sora

attributes.content: Hi, all! I'm everyone's idol, Sora from Monster Siren Records!
attributes.name: Sora

attributes.content: Just look at how excited they are!
attributes.name: Host

attributes.content: I really am glad you love me so much!
attributes.name: Sora

attributes.content: But I'm sure you're all expecting our other guest who's joining us last-minute tonight, because I know I am! I'm a huge fan of hers!
attributes.name: Sora
Sora
attributes.content: Ooh, you can't wait either, can you?

attributes.name: Sora
attributes.content: Alright, let's give a big warm welcome to—Miss Nyamu!
Good even-nyamu-nyamu~!
attributes.name: Nyamu Yūtenji

attributes.content: Hello to all my fans, Nyamu here~! I'm so happy to see you all!
attributes.name: Nyamu Yūtenji

attributes.content: Show me your pass! No entry without one!
attributes.name: Busy Security Guard

attributes.content: If you're not staff or registered, stand outside and stop squeezing through!
attributes.name: Busy Security Guard

attributes.content: Diu, there's just too many people!
attributes.name: Busy Security Guard

attributes.content: Sora...! Nyamu! I love you!!
attributes.name: Excited Fan

attributes.content: Hey, stop that guy—don't let him get inside!
attributes.name: Busy Security Guard

attributes.content: ...This place is an utter mess.
attributes.name: Sakiko Togawa

attributes.content: Why are there so many people...?
attributes.name: Sakiko Togawa

attributes.content: ...I don't see any chance of infiltrating inside.
attributes.name: Sakiko Togawa

attributes.content: Hey, little lady. Wanna head inside and see the stars?
Huh?
attributes.name: Sakiko Togawa

attributes.content: Whose fan are you? Sora's, or Nyamu's?
attributes.name: Strange Man

attributes.content: Whichever it is, I've got methods. I can get you in to see her.
attributes.name: Strange Man

attributes.content: ...Why are you assisting me?
attributes.name: Sakiko Togawa

attributes.content: Hey, no need to be nervous now.
attributes.name: Strange Man

attributes.content: It won't cost you that much... Yeah, here's the price.
attributes.name: Strange Man

attributes.content: ...I don't have the money.
attributes.name: Sakiko Togawa

attributes.content: Hey, this is a bargain price as is! No haggling!
attributes.name: Strange Man

attributes.content: That doesn't change the fact that I don't...
attributes.name: Sakiko Togawa

attributes.content: (Dubious doesn't begin to describe this man... but I really don't see any alternative right now. If I don't seize this chance...)
attributes.name: Sakiko Togawa

attributes.content: (I'll just have to trust him for now.)
attributes.name: Sakiko Togawa

attributes.content: (Digs through her pockets)
attributes.name: Sakiko Togawa

attributes.content: Here, this is it... all the money I have on me. What do you make of that?
attributes.name: Sakiko Togawa

attributes.content: Deal! Follow me.
attributes.name: Strange Man

attributes.content: Staff-only access...?
attributes.name: Sakiko Togawa

attributes.content: Yeah. We'll head in through here.
attributes.name: Strange Man

attributes.content: What about the visitor's pass?
attributes.name: Sakiko Togawa

attributes.content: Don't have any.
attributes.name: Strange Man

attributes.content: So you're a staff member?
attributes.name: Sakiko Togawa

attributes.content: Nope.
attributes.name: Strange Man

attributes.content: Then how do we get in? What do you intend to do if someone catches us?!
attributes.name: Sakiko Togawa

attributes.content: I said I've got methods! You want to see the stars up close or not?
attributes.name: Strange Man

attributes.content: (Whisper) Puk gaai, he heard us...
attributes.name: Strange Man

attributes.content: (Whisper) He's coming this way! We have to hurry before he—
attributes.name: Sakiko Togawa

attributes.content: Hey! What the hell are you doing here?!
attributes.name: Strange Man

attributes.content: Wargh—!
attributes.name: Patrolling Guard & Sakiko Togawa

attributes.content: I told you to be on standby with the backup equipment!
attributes.name: Strange Man

attributes.content: Oh, stagehands don't matter, huh, is that your opinion? What's your plan when the prop crew needs backups and you're sitting on them, huh?!
attributes.name: Strange Man

attributes.content: You little punk, skiving off like that.
attributes.name: Strange Man

attributes.content: Hey. No need to be so harsh. Look at her, she's scared so bad she can't even talk.
attributes.name: Patrolling Guard

attributes.content: Don't just stand there, then! Get back to the set!
attributes.name: Strange Man

attributes.content: ...Understood.
attributes.name: Sakiko Togawa

attributes.content: Young lady, the set's that way...
attributes.name: Patrolling Guard

attributes.content: Don't tell her!
attributes.name: Strange Man

attributes.content: Let's see her come back and beg when she can't find it! I'll dock her pay for any losses from holding us up!
attributes.name: Strange Man

attributes.content: You gotta do your best!
attributes.name: Patrolling Guard

attributes.content: You gotta do your best!
attributes.name: Sakiko Togawa

attributes.content: Well, go! Move it!
attributes.name: Strange Man

attributes.content: Whoof. Hard to make a living these days, isn't it...
attributes.name: Patrolling Guard

attributes.content: Hey, hey. How's the sitch over there?
All good here.
attributes.name: Patrolling Guard

attributes.content: All good here.
attributes.name: Patrolling Guard

attributes.content: Good. Keep on truckin'.
attributes.name: Croissant

attributes.content: Argh—job's got me so damn busy my head's explodin'!
attributes.name: Croissant

attributes.content: Nyamu's just too damn popular! Got a Nyamu fan on every corner...
attributes.name: Croissant

attributes.content: Nyamu must be having a tough time too...
attributes.name: Penguin Logistics Employee

attributes.content: You know how Miss Sora gets up before the sun's risen to practice? And how she's running around place to place to repay her fans' love. She always looks beat when I see her after dark.
attributes.name: Penguin Logistics Employee

attributes.content: Miss Nyamu rose to stardom so quickly. Got her own channel, her acting commitments, her show bookings...
attributes.name: Penguin Logistics Employee

attributes.content: She used to post videos of drum practice, but lately she hasn't been uploading them at all...
attributes.name: Penguin Logistics Employee

attributes.content: You're a Nyamu-chan fan, huh?
attributes.name: Croissant

attributes.content: Yeah... I got into drums in the first place because of her videos.
attributes.name: Penguin Logistics Employee

attributes.content: Sometimes I watch the old uploads when I'm feeling like giving up.
attributes.name: Penguin Logistics Employee

attributes.content: I wonder if she can still make music with joy these days. Like she did in The Drummer Girl.
attributes.name: Penguin Logistics Employee

attributes.content: Uh! Sorry, I got carried away talking.
attributes.name: Penguin Logistics Employee

attributes.content: The most important thing is to keep Sora safe! Let's get back to work and keep our eyes sharp.
attributes.name: Penguin Logistics Employee

attributes.content: Easy there, ain't all that much stress. I got some new toys here. These babies can automatically identify unauthorized visitors—
attributes.name: Croissant

attributes.content: You're kiddin' me...
attributes.name: Croissant

attributes.content: Two suspicious figures in Area A! Drones out!
attributes.name: Croissant

attributes.content: Two figures run through the narrow corridor, their frantic sprint enforced by the dozens of armed drones chasing.
I should never... have trusted you!!
attributes.name: Sakiko Togawa

attributes.content: I'm just as lost as you! This never happened to anyone I sneaked in before!
attributes.name: Strange Man

attributes.content: When'd they get all this surveillance and dronepower?!
attributes.name: Strange Man

attributes.content: Shoot, the drones are catching up! Run! Runnn!
attributes.name: Strange Man

attributes.content: (Strange sound)
attributes.name: Strange Man

attributes.content: Heheheh-heh-heh.... hah-hahahahah!!
attributes.name: Strange Man

attributes.content: Suddenly, the man who was accompanying Sakiko is nowhere to be seen. In his place, she finds a familiar face.
Hahahahah-hah! This is so much fun!!
attributes.name: Morpheus

attributes.content: (Joyful cry)
attributes.name: Corettons

attributes.content: Well? Are you enjoying this girl's sweet dream?
attributes.name: Morpheus

attributes.content: She seems SMITTEN with all the love being showered on her. I don't think she eeeever wants to leave!
attributes.name: Morpheus

attributes.content: You're responsible for all this?!
attributes.name: Sakiko Togawa

attributes.content: I thought I made it clear when you challenged me—this was never going to be easy.
attributes.name: Morpheus

attributes.content: I demand you let me see her!
attributes.name: Sakiko Togawa

attributes.content: Well, that's not hard. Just go straight down the corridor, aaaaall the way down, and you'll find her!
attributes.name: Morpheus

attributes.content: If I were you, though, I'd want to see about losing these things behind you first!
attributes.name: Morpheus

attributes.content: (Chirping in agreement)
attributes.name: Corettons

attributes.content: She's runnin' towards the set! Sora's in danger! Stop her!
attributes.name: Croissant

attributes.content: ...Dammit!
attributes.name: Sakiko Togawa

attributes.content: Sakiko feels the floor grow soft beneath her feet. The door ahead of her falls away for each step she makes. There seems to be no end to this nightmarish run.
Yūtenji, I want you to wake up!!
attributes.name: Sakiko Togawa

attributes.content: Track her motions, zoom in—
attributes.name: Voice from the Communicator

attributes.content: Good, a little closer, focus her face, pan over those pale lips.
attributes.name: Voice from the Communicator

attributes.content: 'What is the meaning of a doll's existence?'
'To stand in a shop window, imitating the motions of those outside.'
'To bring laughter to people with clumsy imitation.'
'When the doll is happy, everyone smiles.'
'Even when the doll is sad, everyone smiles.'
'Now, we bid you enjoy this doll's show—'
...Perfect.
attributes.name: Voice from the Communicator

attributes.content: A-Amazing...
attributes.name: Sora

attributes.content: I can't believe it! You were born to act!!
attributes.name: Host

attributes.content: Heheh. I only really got a hang of this one recently.
attributes.name: Nyamu Yūtenji

attributes.content: I practiced in front of a mirror night after night, trying to understand the thoughts of a doll.
attributes.name: Nyamu Yūtenji

attributes.content: Understanding a doll? Wow, now that sounds pretty out there, haha...
attributes.name: Host

attributes.content: It must have taken so much hard work to nail the performance, Miss Nyamu!
attributes.name: Sora

attributes.content: ...Well, I always think I've still got a long way to go.
attributes.name: Nyamu Yūtenji

attributes.content: Everyone around me is blessed with these incredible abilities.
attributes.name: Nyamu Yūtenji

attributes.content: There's famous child actors who were born with a silver spoon in their mouth.
attributes.name: Nyamu Yūtenji

attributes.content: There's people who fall into the deepest pits and still carry on shining bright.
attributes.name: Nyamu Yūtenji

attributes.content: I run until I can't run anymore, just to barely catch up to them...
attributes.name: Nyamu Yūtenji

attributes.content: I have a trick or two up my sleeve, but in front of their talent, really, I have nothing.
attributes.name: Nyamu Yūtenji

attributes.content: So when so many people love me, love someone so mediocre and ordinary like me, I have to work ten times harder just to answer their appreciation.
attributes.name: Nyamu Yūtenji

attributes.content: Miss Nyamu... you're incredible as is.
attributes.name: Sora

attributes.content: I'm sure everyone here will agree with me when I say—we all love you.
attributes.name: Sora

attributes.content: Yeah... thank you, everybody.
attributes.name: Nyamu Yūtenji

attributes.content: What an emotional scene, folks. It's been wonderful having our two incredible guests on set this evening.
attributes.name: Host

attributes.content: Say, while we're in the mood, I just had a little idea—
attributes.name: Host

attributes.content: Will the two of you do us the honor of reenacting that classic scene from The Drummer Girl?
attributes.name: Host

attributes.content: Sure!
attributes.name: Nyamu Yūtenji & Sora

attributes.content: Nyamu and Sora take positions, following the instructions from their earpieces.
The skies are blue. The summer breeze carries the scent of afar.
The cry of the fowlbeasts.
The sound of breathing.
—Come down from the roof!
attributes.name: Sora

attributes.content: No! These are my dreams! I'll shout them at the top of my voice from the highest point around!
attributes.name: Nyamu Yūtenji

attributes.content: It is the job of an idol to be the picture of perfection.
Even if it takes a little lying at times.
But—but—you only just decided to buy a drum set!
attributes.name: Sora

attributes.content: What if you end up giving up on drums? People will laugh at you!
attributes.name: Sora

attributes.content: I've made up my mind! I'll play drums the rest of my life! I'll play until my hands won't move anymore!
attributes.name: Nyamu Yūtenji

attributes.content: But I gave up on drums.
My dream's to be the best drummer in Lungmen—
attributes.name: Nyamu Yūtenji

attributes.content: I did it. I became who everyone loves me for being.
No, in all of Terra!
attributes.name: Nyamu Yūtenji

attributes.content: This is fine. I'm fine. This is the recognition I wanted, the status I wanted—
Is it? This? Is this really what I wanted?
The cry of the fowlbeasts.
The sound of breathing.
The sound of glass breaking.
A sound that shouldn't have been heard during filming.
The night's breeze is cold and indifferent, yet the mind is still murky as to all that is happening.
...Huh?
attributes.name: Nyamu Yūtenji

attributes.content: W-What happened?
attributes.name: Host

attributes.content: Miss Nyamu??
attributes.name: Sora

attributes.content: Y'all guard Sora! Someone's kidnapped Nyamu! I'm after them!
attributes.name: Croissant

attributes.content: The sounds of chaos from behind grow more distant by the second.
When Nyamu finally snaps out of it, she finds herself and Sakiko together in freefall.
What kind of 'sweet dream' is this?
attributes.name: Sakiko Togawa

attributes.content: You lost your drums, you lost your friends, you lost yourself. Even if countless people adore you now, can you still call this your dream?
attributes.name: Sakiko Togawa

attributes.content: Where is my sharp-witted, silver-tongued Yūtenji-san?
attributes.name: Sakiko Togawa

attributes.content: But—but...
attributes.name: Nyamu Yūtenji

attributes.content: Nyamu. It's time to wake up.
attributes.name: Sakiko Togawa
